This park is fabulous because of the views of the city skyline.  It is on a slope and at the upper part of the slope, the views are superb.  Some of the best weather in the city, often less fog than elsewhere.  On a sunny day, it is very popular.
Beautiful green park in Mission spotless and very busy, easily accessible by subway or train Beautiful view of San Francisco quiet and safe even in the evening

One of the most popular parks in town probably because it is in the middle of a very populous district.  And there are great views of downtown.  Always something going on, lots of picnics, music.  And when there is good sun, lots of people come here to sun bathe.  A pretty place.
